title: Chiliz (CHZ) Price Forecast & Scenarios
content: Analyzing the price trajectory of Chiliz (CHZ) requires a multi-faceted approach that balances historical volatility with current market conditions. With a market phase that is currently neutral and stable, CHZ has demonstrated a distinct range in the previous 30 days, fluctuating between a high of $0.039874 and a low of $0.032172. | Metric | Details | | :--- | :--- | | Current Price | {{LIVE_PRICE}} | | 30-Day High | $0.039874 | | 30-Day Low | $0.032172 | | 1-Year High | $0.061883 | | 1-Year Low | $0.027780 | ## Recent Performance and Trends Over the last 30 days, the token has seen an average price of $0.036103, reflecting a change of -1.59%. This short-term stagnation follows a broader one-year trend where the token moved within a range of $0.061883 to $0.027780, resulting in a yearly change of -23.41%. These figures highlight that CHZ is currently trading significantly below its historical all-time high, presenting a scenario that requires careful risk assessment. ## Support and Resistance Levels Technical analysis suggests that the $0.027 level acts as a critical psychological and historical floor, having been tested during the past year. Conversely, the $0.061 resistance level represents the primary barrier to bullish momentum. In comparison to broader L1 competitors like Internet Computer and the highly active Injective, Chiliz shows lower current liquidity and volume, which may exacerbate price swings in either direction during periods of market stress. ## Market Scenarios Analysis In a base case scenario, the asset is expected to continue its current consolidation, remaining within the established yearly range as the ecosystem focuses on increasing adoption among new sporting franchises. A bullish scenario would depend on significant spikes in ecosystem activity and wider adoption of the Chiliz Chain, potentially testing the $0.06 range again. Conversely, a bearish scenario could emerge if market sentiment deteriorates, potentially retesting the $0.027 support level. ## Risk and Market Factors Our TokenRadar Risk Score for CHZ is 6 out of 10, indicating a medium-risk classification. Investors should be aware that the asset's performance is closely tied to the sports industry's seasonal nature, which can introduce cyclic volatility. Furthermore, the regulatory environment for tokens labeled as 'alleged securities' remains a significant headwind for price appreciation. By comparing CHZ to peers like Injective, one can observe that Chiliz has a more specialized, rather than generalized, utility, which effectively narrows its target market to sports enthusiasts. --- *Disclaimer: This article is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Always do your own research (DYOR).*
